Jordan Rivera
Senior Software Engineer — jordan.rivera@example.com

EXPERIENCE

Acme Payments — Staff Engineer (2022–2025)
Led the migration of the billing platform off a monolith onto event-driven services.
Cut end-of-month invoice generation from six hours to under twenty minutes by
parallelizing the reconciliation job and adding a caching layer. Mentored four
engineers through the transition and wrote the runbook the on-call team still uses.

Northwind Retail — Senior Engineer (2019–2022)
Owned the checkout service through a replatforming that doubled peak throughput.
Introduced load-shedding and circuit breakers that dropped checkout error rates
during Black Friday from 4% to under 0.3%. Ran the incident review process and
turned recurring pages into a backlog the team actually burned down.

SKILLS
Distributed systems, TypeScript, Go, PostgreSQL, observability, on-call leadership.
